pr.title: Fix corrupted artifacts/awdp-site/vercel.json breaking Vercel deployments
pr.body: ## Summary `artifacts/awdp-site/vercel.json` had **invalid JSON** from a bad merge — rewrite entries were mixed into the `headers` array (line 24), a comma was missing (line 23), and the `headers` key was duplicated (line 44). This produced malformed JSON that broke all Vercel deployments. Restored the file to valid, clean JSON with the correct structure. ## Review & Testing Checklist for Human - [ ] Merge and verify Vercel deployment succeeds (this is the most likely fix for the persistent failures) - [ ] Verify `https://www.allwindowdoorparts.com/api/healthz` returns `{"status":"ok"}` - [ ] Verify `https://www.allwindowdoorparts.com/` loads the homepage ### Notes - The corruption was introduced when merging main into PR #124's branch — rewrite entries ended up inside the `headers` array - The root `vercel.json` is fine; only `artifacts/awdp-site/vercel.json` was affected Link to Devin session: https://app.devin.ai/sessions/9bd3cd88f5fd44588b47c179eb66930f Requested by: @alykay1522 --- ## Summary by cubic Fix invalid JSON in `artifacts/awdp-site/vercel.json` that broke Vercel deployments. Restores valid structure by removing a duplicate `headers` block, moving rewrite entries out of `headers`, and fixing a missing comma. Written for commit 71780889272da93e3025f6cfec858adc8db9e961. Summary will update on new commits. Review in cubic
pr.author: devin-ai-integration[bot]
